case_title: DEVINE, DOUG VS EDWARDS MOVING & STORAGE, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DEVINE, DOUG AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS MOVING & STORAGE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1999 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
